runners.formComment: Missed the frame latest (23.45) when fourth over 400m at The Gardens in a Grade 5. Starts from box 1 for the first time here. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

runners.formComment: Was out of placings last time (23.07) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing fifth and beaten 12 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting one victory and two places from four starts. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.

runners.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 7 lengths over 388m at this track in a handy (22.22), beating Ibrox Maverick. Will find this a bit tougher, not up to this.

runners.formComment: Finished off last campaign with a win (29.58) over 515m at this track three-and-a-half months ago. Jumps well and will be in this for a long way despite the tricky draw.

runners.formComment: Didn't finish two back and couldn't make the frame last time when she finished 4th in a Grade 5 on March 10 over 388m at this track behind Pitman Go Well beaten 3.5 lengths (22.66). Doesn't look smart enough to threaten the top few.
